content.p: This problem does not ask you to read input or compute a result. It asks you to print four fixed lines exactly as written. Every letter, space, newline, and decimal digit is part of the answer.
When the required output is fully fixed, printing string literals directly is the most stable approach.
\n does not print a backslash and the letter n. Inside a string literal, it becomes one newline character. This kind of special notation is called an escape sequence.
content.callout: For fixed-output problems, exact text matters more than clever code. Treat capitalization, spaces, line breaks, and decimal digits as part of the required answer.
